disclosure.md:
# Synthetic demonstration / 虚构演示

> Synthetic demonstration — not a real client matter, not known to be novel, and not filing-ready. / 虚构演示——并非真实客户案件，未确认具备新颖性，也不可直接用于申请。

> This package provides drafting and evidence-governance assistance, not legal advice. It does not guarantee patentability, validity, non-infringement, freedom to operate, ownership, grant, or fitness for filing. Obtain qualified patent counsel review before disclosure, filing, or reliance. / 本文件仅提供专利撰写与证据治理辅助，不构成法律意见，也不保证可专利性、有效性、不侵权、自由实施、权属、授权或适合直接申请。披露、申请或据此作出决定前，应由具备资质的专利专业人员审核。

## Engineering background / 工程背景

This synthetic exercise considers a fixture for holding a specimen during an engineering operation. It contains no client material and reports no test result. / 本合成练习讨论一种在工程操作中压持试件的夹具，不含客户材料，也不记载任何试验结果。

## Technical problem / 技术问题

The design exercise asks how a resilient pressing member and spaced supports could constrain a specimen while preserving an auditable relation between each proposed limitation and its source. / 本设计练习拟讨论如何利用弹性压持件和间隔设置的支承件约束试件，并使每项拟议限定与来源之间保持可审计关系。

## Proposed solution / 拟议方案

As a designed proposal, the fixture may include a resilient pressing structure with a nominal spacing of 10 mm. The spacing is a synthetic design target, not a measured or optimized value. / 作为拟议设计，该夹具可包括弹性压持结构，其名义间距为10 mm。该间距仅为合成设计目标，不是实测值或优化结果。

## Figure plan / 附图计划

![Figure 1 — synthetic fixture concept / 图1——合成夹具构思](figure-1.png)

Figure 1 is a synthetic structural sketch and does not depict a tested apparatus. / 图1为合成结构示意，不代表已经试验的装置。

## Verification boundary / 验证边界

No statement in this sample establishes performance, manufacturability, novelty, or suitability for filing. Dimensions, loads, materials, tolerances, and operating conditions require separately documented verification. / 本样例不证明性能、可制造性、新颖性或申请适格性。尺寸、载荷、材料、公差和工况均须另行形成有据可查的验证记录。
prior_art.md:
# Prior-art comparison / 现有技术对比

No qualifying prior-art record is asserted for this synthetic release sample, and no novelty conclusion is made. A real matter must verify publication dates, canonical sources, and family grouping before comparison. / 本合成发布样例不主张存在可用于评价的现有技术记录，也不作新颖性结论。真实案件在开展对比前，必须核验公开日、规范来源和专利族归并结果。

| Comparison item / 对比项目 | Sample status / 样例状态 | Required real-case evidence / 真实案件所需证据 |
|---|---|---|
| Publication date / 公开日 | not asserted / 未主张 | verified public record / 经核验的公开记录 |
| Patent family / 专利族 | not asserted / 未主张 | deduplicated family identifier / 去重后的家族标识 |
| Feature mapping / 特征映射 | not performed / 未实施 | verbatim source location / 逐字来源位置 |
risk_register.md:
# Risk register / 风险表

| Risk / 风险 | Evidence basis / 证据基础 | Disposition / 处置 |
|---|---|---|
| The 10 mm target may be mistaken for a measured optimum. / 10 mm目标可能被误读为实测最优值。 | designed only / 仅属拟议设计 | retain verification language; block achieved-result wording / 保留待验证措辞，并阻断已实现效果表述 |
| The synthetic claim may be mistaken for filing advice. / 合成权项可能被误读为申请建议。 | no novelty search / 未开展新颖性检索 | require qualified professional review / 必须由具备资质的专业人员审核 |
| Bilingual scope may drift. / 双语保护范围可能漂移。 | paired atom comparison / 成对原子比对 | block on object, relation, bound, condition, modality, or dependency mismatch / 对对象、关系、边界、条件、模态或引用关系不一致实施阻断 |
verification_matrix.md:
# Verification matrix / 验证矩阵

| Item / 项目 | Evidence class / 证据等级 | Current status / 当前状态 | Acceptance evidence / 验收证据 |
|---|---|---|---|
| Spacing 10 mm / 间距10 mm | designed / 拟议设计 | to be verified / 待验证 | documented measurement method and source location / 有据可查的测量方法和来源位置 |
| Resilient pressing relation / 弹性压持关系 | designed / 拟议设计 | to be verified / 待验证 | structural drawing and review record / 结构图及审核记录 |
| Performance / 性能 | none / 无 | not claimed / 未主张 | test protocol and measured result would be required / 如需主张，须有试验方案和实测结果 |
